nodes.name: Quality Gate
nodes.notes: V0 proxy: reject files under ~40KB (usually blurry/cropped thumbnails). Upgrade later to a sharpness check in the worker service.

parameters.text: Photo saaf nahi aayi. Kripya din ki roshni mein, phone ko sthir rakh kar, poora card dikhate hue dobara photo bhejiye. 📸

parameters.jsCode:
const prompt = `Extract fields from this Indian identity/welfare document image. Output ONLY JSON: { \"doc_type\": \"ration_card|aadhaar|income_cert|other\", \"fields\": { \"name\": null, \"dob_or_age\": null, \"gender\": null, \"district\": null, \"state\": null, \"category\": null, \"annual_income\": null, \"marital_status\": null }, \"confidence\": {}, \"aadhaar_last4\": null }. If an Aadhaar number is visible return ONLY its last 4 digits in aadhaar_last4. Use null for absent fields. Never guess income.`;
return [{ json: { ...$json, body: { contents: [{ parts: [ { inline_data: { mime_type: $json.mime, data: $json.image_b64 } }, { text: prompt } ] }], generationConfig: { responseMimeType: 'application/json', maxOutputTokens: 500 } } } }];

nodes.name: Parse & Mask
nodes.notes: Aadhaar: only last 4 digits ever reach the database.

parameters.query:
WITH u AS (
  UPDATE users SET profile = profile || $2::jsonb
  WHERE tg_chat_id = $1 RETURNING id
)
INSERT INTO documents (user_id, doc_type, fields, quality_score)
SELECT id, $3, $4::jsonb, 1.0 FROM u
RETURNING user_id;

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.profile,
  (SELECT json_agg(DISTINCT r->>'field')
   FROM schemes s, jsonb_array_elements(s.config->'eligibility'->'all') r
   WHERE s.active) AS needed_fields
FROM users u WHERE u.tg_chat_id = $1;

nodes.name: Compute Needed Fields
nodes.notes: Config drives the questions: the set of fields used by any active scheme's rules. Adding scheme #16 automatically teaches the Profiler its new field.

parameters.text:
=Card mil gaya, dhanyavaad! ✅ Bas ek-do baatein aur:
{{ $json.question }}
